---
name: Error Message Quality
description: Error messages must state what failed, why (if known), and what to do next. Never "something went wrong".
type: feedback
---

G (2026-04-01): "If an error message doesn't tell the user what to do next, it's not an error message — it's a shrug."

**How to apply:** Every error: (1) what failed, (2) why if known, (3) what to do. Minimum: what + what to do.
